---
title: "Welcome to my new website"
date: 2026-05-26
description: "Launching my personal academic website — a central hub for research, publications, datasets, and open science."
---

<div class="page">

# Welcome to my new website

I'm excited to launch this personal academic website, built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and hosted on GitHub Pages.

This site serves as a central hub for my research on climate change, glaciology, hydrology, and deep learning for Earth systems. Here you'll find:

- **Publications** — peer-reviewed articles with DOIs and links
- **Datasets** — open hydrometeorological data published on Zenodo
- **CV** — full academic curriculum vitae
- **Blog** — updates on research, fieldwork, and other activities

I'm committed to open and reproducible science. All code, data, and software developed as part of my research is publicly available unless otherwise noted.

Stay tuned for more posts on glacier modelling, hydrological predictions, and deep learning applications in Earth sciences.

</div>
